The Catcoin Project Â· By the dev who shipped the first cat coin in 2013 
The Catcoin Project EST Â· 2026 Market The Project Token Lore Roadmap Transmission Buy $CATCOIN â Market The Project Token Lore Roadmap Transmission the original cat coin dev 
In December 2013, kr105 forked Litecoin and shipped
Catcoin, the first cat-themed blockchain. He stepped away. The chain still ticks.
In 2026 he's back with $CATCOIN on Solana. New chain, same person, the only
cat coin he stands behind.
Buy $CATCOIN 
What we're building
> contract address 5gTPspC2ricuGWiYQ4Ghausg8fsq7uCrGgSVACatcoin 5gTP...coin copy Live market .
â PRICE â MCAP â VOL Â· 24H â LIQUIDITY TIME TX SIDE AMOUNT $CATCOIN VALUE USD FROM THE PROJECT Â· OVERVIEW More than a token. We are The Catcoin Project. 
Most cat coins are a tweet. The Catcoin Project is a long-running
thing with the token at the center, real games on the way, and a
promise to put actual cats first when the math allows. More pillars
will land as the project grows. We are not in a hurry.
LIVE $CATCOIN Â· The Token The heart of the project. Lives on Solana. No presale, no insiders, no team allocation. A continuous burn loop reduces supply as fees flow in. The token is what funds everything else we build. See tokenomics â LIVE Games Â· lastcat.gg Playable cat games on chain, integrated with $CATCOIN. Built by kr105. Seasonal burns funded by gameplay. The project has hands, not just a price chart. Visit lastcat.gg â AT $500K ATH Real Cats Get Fed Once the token crosses $500,000 all-time high, treasury starts donating to verified cat shelters, published on chain so anyone can follow the money. Real cats too, not only digital ones. See the roadmap â LORE Â· WHERE THE CAT CAME FROM Most cat coins last a week. This dev's been on virtual cats for over 13 years. 
In December 2013, days after the world fell in love with a Shiba,
a young developer in Chile forked Litecoin and shipped the first
cat-themed blockchain. He called it Catcoin. He posted the
announcement on Bitcointalk. The signature on that post still
matches the wallet that signs this site.
Real life had other plans, and he had to step away. Others kept the chain
alive. It still produces blocks today, in someone else's hands,
which is more than most coins that age ever get. But this site
is not that chain. This is what came next.
In 2026 the founder came back. Not with a new L1 of his own this
time, but with a Solana token built for fast finality, gas-light
fees and on-chain smart contracts. New chain. New token. Same dev
at the wheel.
â READ THE FULL TRANSMISSION
SUPPLY Â· ON CHAIN The numbers, live on chain. 
No presale. Mint authority renounced. Freeze authority renounced.
No dev allocation, no vesting. Everything is where the market
put it.
Initial supply 0 CATCOIN Fixed. No mint authority. Current supply 0 CATCOIN What exists right now on chain. Pool 34.7% Holders 65.3% Burned 0.0% In liquidity pool 0 CATCOIN Still in the AMM, waiting to be bought. Held by community 0 CATCOIN Bought out of the pool. In real wallets. Burned 0 CATCOIN GONE FOREVER WHAT HAPPENED Â· WHAT'S NEXT From 2013. The long way back. 
Here is what happened, in order. Some of it has kr105's magic.
Some of it doesn't. What's coming next does.
DEC Â· 2013 Genesis Catcoin L1 ships, days after Dogecoin. Forked from Litecoin. The first cat-themed chain ever produced. Posted on Bitcointalk by kr105. 2014 Â· 2025 The Long Block kr105 steps away. Others keep the L1 producing blocks. It still runs today, in someone else's hands. This project does not claim those years as its own. EARLY Â· 2026 Return on Solana kr105 comes back, not with a new L1 of his own, but with a new token on Solana. No presale, no insiders, no team allocation. Brand new token, same dev at the wheel. Q2 Â· 2026 Burn Loop Â· Live Tape Â· Site On-chain indexer goes live. Continuous burn from fee flow. This site goes public. Lore, tokenomics, and the story going back to 2013. APR Â· 2026 Games on Chain lastcat.gg goes live and integrates the token. Playable cat games on Solana with on-chain scores and seasonal burns from gameplay. $500K ATH Real Cats Get Fed Once the token crosses $500K all-time-high, a percentage of treasury is donated to verified cat shelters. Published on chain so anyone can follow the money. kr105 Â· APRIL 2026 Â· ONE THING 
âThis is and will be the only Catcoin token that carries my approval
and support. No other cat tokens will be backed by me. â
Carlos Pizarro Â· kr105 CREATOR Â· CATCOIN L1 Â· 2013 FOUNDER Â· THE CATCOIN PROJECT Â· 2026
